batch_summary: Monica invites Joey into her apartment for lemonade after a brief conversation in the hallway. While Monica is in the kitchen pouring the drinks, she tells Joey to make himself comfortable. Taking her literally, Joey completely undresses. When Monica turns around with the glasses, she is shocked to find Joey standing completely naked. A hilarious misunderstanding unfolds as Joey explains he believed an invitation for lemonade, iced tea, or juice was a universal code for sex. Monica, horrified, demands he cover himself up.

While Monica prepares the drinks in the kitchen and explains how she got the apartment from her grandmother, she tells Joey to make himself comfortable. Joey takes this instruction to the extreme and completely undresses behind a wicker chest in the living room. When Monica turns around to hand him his drink, she is stunned and horrified to find him standing entirely naked. A comical confrontation ensues as Monica demands to know what he is doing. Joey defensively explains that, in his experience, an invitation for lemonade—or iced tea, or sometimes juice—is always a euphemism for sex. Realizing his mistake, a sheepish Joey apologizes and covers himself up while Monica reacts in disbelief at his assumption.

batch_summary: After Joey sheepishly puts his clothes back on, Monica tries to be understanding, though she humorously points out he still hasn't put his pants on. Later, Monica questions Phoebe about her missing bed, leading to a shocking revelation: Phoebe confesses she has secretly moved out of the apartment. To Monica's dismay, Phoebe reveals that everyone else in their friend group already knew, explaining that their relationship only improved because they stopped living together.
